name: Ima 1 Month Cash Advance
description_short: Miami-based payday loan agency offering same-day cash advances up to $5,000 with flexible terms and acceptance of all credit profiles.
description_long:
Ima 1 Month Cash Advance is a loan agency operating out of Miami, Florida, specializing in short-term emergency lending solutions. The company is listed on the WeLoans directory and maintains a physical storefront at 3009 SW 107th Ave, Miami, FL 33165, with regular business hours Monday through Thursday 10AM–6PM, Friday 10AM–6PM, and Saturday 10AM–4PM. The agency functions as a loan facilitator that connects borrowers with lenders rather than lending directly.

The company offers payday loans, installment loans, and title loans through their platform. Borrowers can apply online or visit the physical location and receive funding in as little as 5 minutes. Loan amounts range from under $500 up to $5,000 or more, with flexible borrowing options across multiple tiers. The application process is designed for speed and accessibility, claiming to accept all credit profiles including those with bad credit.

Ima 1 Month Cash Advance distinguishes itself by emphasizing accessibility—they explicitly state they accept all credit types and offer no service charges through their WeLoans platform. Their calculator tool allows borrowers to estimate payments and APR before applying, promoting transparency. The physical location provides in-person service options, which some consumers prefer for immediate, face-to-face transactions.

However, potential borrowers should note that payday and title loans carry substantial costs. The calculator example shows an APR of 311% on a sample loan, which is extremely high. While the company accepts credit-challenged borrowers, this accessibility comes at a steep price. Borrowers unable to repay on time are advised to contact the lender for negotiation, but the high APR indicates significant financial risk for those in vulnerable circumstances.
pros: 5-minute online application process with rapid approval
Accepts all credit profiles, including poor and bad credit
Loan amounts available from under $500 to $5,000+
Multiple loan types: payday, installment, and title loans
Online calculator tool allows borrowers to estimate payments and APR before applying
Physical storefront location enables in-person service
No service charges advertised through WeLoans platform
Extended business hours including Saturday availability
cons: Extremely high APR of 311% shown in calculator example creates significant debt risk
Operating as a loan agency rather than direct lender may create confusion about actual terms and conditions
Limited transparency about exact fees, penalties, and rollover policies on website
No information provided about whether loans can be extended or rolled over, a common concern with payday lending
High cost of borrowing may trap financially vulnerable consumers in debt cycles
best_for: Consumers in urgent need of emergency cash (medical bills, car repairs, evictions)
Borrowers with poor credit who cannot qualify for traditional bank loans
Those who prefer in-person transactions and immediate face-to-face service
Short-term borrowers who can repay within the loan term without extension
diagnosis: Ima 1 Month Cash Advance is best for borrowers with bad credit facing genuine emergencies who need cash within hours and can repay within the loan term. The primary caveat is that their payday and title loans carry extremely high APR (311% in the example shown), making them a costly option suitable only for true emergencies, not ongoing financial needs.
services: In-person loan processing at physical location
Loan payment calculator with APR estimation
